TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == 228 a demakan i Taywan.二二八事件 == Olanan a 228 hananay a demak i Taywan i, o naitilaay tora piihan no finawelan to demak no Sayfo ama lawlaw itini i cowacowa a niyaroan itini i 1947 a mihcaan to saka tosa a folad to 27 a lomi'adan tangasa i saka lima a folad to 16 a lomi'adan, likorsato iraay to ko pihadefek no Congwhamingko hananay ami ocol to sofitay ami hadefek tofinaweran, nawhani nano 'ayaw naitila toya 1945 a mihecaan to saka mo^tep a foladan, yamahelek ko fodfod tora saka tosa a sakalafodfod no polong no hekalan, maocor nola citodongay to Taywan ami 'ekan to Taywan ci Cen-i hananay a tamdaw apatay i Taywan. oyasa a demak i, masapipakakinih ko faloco' no demak nira ami demak to dademaken, caay ko fangcalay ko pidemak nira to dademaken, sanaw o 'alomanay to cifalocoay o mafana'ay ci halateng a tamdaw no Taywan i, ano haenen ko pidemak o saan, yasahaw i, iraayho ko kara lood no Komintang ato Kiosanto hananay itiya, itini ikalafodfod nara i, o 'orip sa no finaoran, caay ka ^edeng ko saka 'orip to kakaenen ato saka 'orip to kalomaamaan, adihayay ko mapadesay, caay pakakilim to katayalen, lalawlaw sanayho ko 'orip no finaworan ato itini i kasaniyalo', lomasato itini i pakaylaay i kacakat no fana' to tilid i, i'ayaw no fodfod i,onian a Taywan haw i o nano o Dipon komikowanay, sanaw tayni sato koya Holam caay kalalen ko fana', masalomaay ko fana' ato faloco', sanaw iraay ko longoc nora Holam to Taywanay a tamdaw, olanan ko saka lalawlaw nara, sanaw onian ko saka fafodfod no niyalo, ato sakalalowod no finawolan. olarengadan nila : Itini i 1947 no mihecaan to saka tosa a folad 27 a lomi'ad i, ola a simmong ami pacakayay to tamako itini i Tayhok Taypi tin Tinma hananay loma' i, maleped nangra ato kal'ingangen nangra koya ci Lin-cang-may ato mapatay nangra koya Chen-wen-si hananay a tamdaw, orasato oya finawelan, onian sato koya saka keter nangra, sanaw mikihatiya sato ko 'alomanay ami ihang, itini i saka tosa a folad no 28 a lomi'adan, caay to pikihatiya ami pacakay to kalomaamaan, ato caay to kapi tirid, caayay to ka tayal, tayni sato ko 'alomanay finaweran i pipacakayan to tamako ami ihan ato iroma' no citapangay a kakitaan a tamdaw amilongoc to lalongocen, nikaolila kowangen no sofitay no Koaping ko kola taylaay a finaworan, sanaw 'aloman iraay ko mapatayay ato madoka'ay olanan ko lalengatan no kalali'ang sato no finaworan, polong sato tayra i cowacowa no Taywan, orasa yacitongay to finaworan ato tapang kakitaan a tamdaw i, misanga' to ami pasao'po to cacitodong ami demak to sapihapingan toya kalalawlaw no demak a sa'opo, nanay pakayni toya sa'opo ami hapinang toya demak, lomasato, pakayni i sakapolongan a 'icer no finaweran ami sanga' tosaka ci'icer no sofitay ami solimed tora sapilood a kowan, tiya ira to ko^poc no demak tosaka tala'ayaw. Oyasa ci Cen-i a tamdawan i, hato mihaiay ko faloco' nira, ato mirayapay to miketona no sao'po a sowal, nikaolira, onian a demakan i, palao mirawraway to hekal hananay ko sa'osi, sanaw milongoc to ifafaleday ami ocor to sofitay to sapadang, itira toya sakatolo a folad to lima a lomi'adan i, miocor to sofitay a paytayni i Taywan kora Koming-sayfo a tapang ci Chang-chong-cen , i saka tolo folad to ^nem a lomi'adan i, itini i Takaw o citodongay a tapang ci Pong-mong-ci hananay a tamdaw misalingato to ami reper to finawerang, itini i sakatolo a folad to faro a lomia'd o maocoray a himping naitini i Focing tangasaay to i Kilong ci Liw-i-sing ko citodongay ami kerid tola sofitay, sa'alomang sato ko tayniay a tayla i cowacowa ami hadefek to niyalo, toyasato awaay ko militemohay ami ihang, tangasa sato i saka tolo folad to mo^tep a lomi'adan, ci Chen-i hananay a tamdaw i, itiya to ami keton to sapi lik'c to polong no Taywan, caay to kanga'ay ama sa'po to masamaamaanay a sa'po, sanaw tiyato ami salingato adihay to ko mapatayay ato malasawaday a tamdaw, ngalefen itira i Kilong , Kaki , Takaw , mahadefekay ko saka niyaniyalo', pacef sato ami reper to kalo tamdaw, tangasa toya ci Wiy-daw-ming koci todongay a mala-tapang no Taywan, tiya mahelek ko palareper nangra to tamadaw. Olanan a 228 hananay a demakan i, itiyaay a misalingato a saadihayay ko mareperay ato mikowang a mapatay ato o malasawaday a tamdaw no Taywan, ato halo caay ka pisangka to piiehan a ci 'atangalay a tamdaw i, itiyaay ama kalingang, sanaw itiya a misalingato mafalic ko kalodemak no Taywanay a tamdaw, mala siyingter ko kasasilomaloma no tamdaw. Rikosato sahalafin sato ko pilikec nora sayfo to Taywanay a tamdaw to pinapina a mihecaan, olanan koya tomel'iay a mikalingangay hananay a demakan, olanan a 228 hananay a demakan i, o pakayraay to sapi likec to finaweran, sanaw matala:way ko tamdaw ama sasowasowar, itiyaay ami salingato a caayay ka pacefa ko tamdaw ami sasowasowal, ato mi kingkiway sato likisi a tamdaw i, hatiraay to caay ka oso'elinay kopi tilid, tangasa saan i 1980 a mihecaan, olanan a 228 hananay a demakan tiya ilaay to kopi songila' to demak, itiya sato a alamipasadak saan tono teked a faloco ato halateng, tangasa i 1990 a mihecaan polong sato ko 'alomanay a tamdaw ami kakingkiw tora 228 hananay a demak, lomasato irahaca kopi dadimaw toya nano makali'angay a parod to laloma'an, ato mipatileng to sapikining a 'aponong, mipalowad to palo no laloma'an. Aninisato itini i Taywanan mapatileng to ko pikiningan to 228 hananay a Cicinghoy opisopedan to pida, ato palowad to 228 hananay a pikiningan a 'adawang , itini i coacoa a kasaniyalo i, iraay to koya patilengan a silosi no 228 hananay tamohong.(Suman siwkolan 'Amis/Pancah 02/26'25) Tahapinanang參考文獻:
S.PHON: == *** a ɬ~ɮəmakan i tajwan.***** == o~uɾanan a *** ħananaj a ɬ~ɮəmak i tajwan i, o~u naitiɾaaj to~ura piiħan no~u finawəɾan to~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u sajfo~u ama ɾawɾaw itini i ʦo~uwaʦo~uwa a nijaro~uan itini i **** a miħʦaan to~u saka to~usa a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ to~u ** a ɾo~umiʡaɬ~ɮan taŋasa i saka ɾima a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ to~u ** a ɾo~umiʡaɬ~ɮan, ɾiko~ursato~u iraaj to~u ko~u piħaɬ~ɮəfək no~u ʦo~uŋwħamiŋko~u ħananaj ami o~uʦo~uɾ to~u so~ufitaj ami ħaɬ~ɮəfək to~ufinawəran, nawħani nano~u ʡajaw naitiɾa to~uja **** a miħəʦaan to~u saka mo~uʔtəp a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮan, jamaħəɾək ko~u fo~uɬ~ɮfo~uɬ~ɮ to~ura saka to~usa a sakaɾafo~uɬ~ɮfo~uɬ~ɮ no~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ħəkaɾan, mao~uʦo~ur no~uɾa ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u tajwan ami ʡəkan to~u tajwan ʦi ʦən-i ħananaj a tamɬ~ɮaw apataj i tajwan. o~ujasa a ɬ~ɮəmak i, masapipakakiniħ ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u ɬ~ɮəmak nira ami ɬ~ɮəmak to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakən, ʦaaj ko~u faŋʦaɾaj ko~u piɬ~ɮəmak nira to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakən, sanaw o~u ʡaɾo~umanaj to~u ʦifaɾo~uʦo~uaj o~u mafanaʡaj ʦi ħaɾatəŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tajwan i, ano~u ħaənən ko~u piɬ~ɮəmak o~u saan, jasaħaw i, iraajħo~u ko~u kara ɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u ko~umintaŋ ato~u kio~usanto~u ħananaj itija, itini ikaɾafo~uɬ~ɮfo~uɬ~ɮ nara i, o~u ʡo~urip sa no~u finao~uran, ʦaaj ka ʔəɬ~ɮəŋ ko~u saka ʡo~urip to~u kakaənən ato~u saka ʡo~urip to~u kaɾo~umaamaan, aɬ~ɮiħajaj ko~u mapaɬ~ɮəsaj, ʦaaj pakakiɾim to~u katajaɾən, ɾaɾawɾaw sanajħo~u ko~u ʡo~urip no~u finawo~uran ato~u itini i kasanijaɾo~uʡ, ɾo~umasato~u itini i pakajɾaaj i kaʦakat no~u fanaʡ to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ i, iʡajaw no~u fo~uɬ~ɮfo~uɬ~ɮ i,o~unian a tajwan ħaw i o~u nano~u o~u ɬ~ɮipo~un ko~umiko~uwanaj, sanaw tajni sato~u ko~uja ħo~uɾam ʦaaj kaɾaɾən ko~u fanaʡ, masaɾo~umaaj ko~u fanaʡ ato~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ, sanaw iraaj ko~u ɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~ura ħo~uɾam to~u tajwanaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, o~uɾanan ko~u saka ɾaɾawɾaw nara, sanaw o~unian ko~u saka fafo~uɬ~ɮfo~uɬ~ɮ no~u nijaɾo~u, ato~u sakaɾaɾo~uwo~uɬ~ɮ no~u finawo~uɾan. o~uɾarəŋaɬ~ɮan niɾa : itini i **** no~u miħəʦaan to~u saka to~usa a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** a ɾo~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i, o~uɾa a simmo~uŋ ami paʦakajaj to~u tamako~u itini i tajħo~uk tajpi tin tinma ħananaj ɾo~umaʡ i, maɾəpəɬ~ɮ naŋra ato~u kaɾʡiŋaŋən naŋra ko~uja ʦi ɾin-ʦaŋ-maj ato~u mapataj naŋra ko~uja ʦħən-wən-si ħananaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, o~urasato~u o~uja finawəɾan, o~unian sato~u ko~uja saka kətər naŋra, sanaw mikiħatija sato~u ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj ami iħaŋ, itini i saka to~usa a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ no~u ** a ɾo~umiʡaɬ~ɮan, ʦaaj to~u pikiħatija ami paʦakaj to~u kaɾo~umaamaan, ato~u ʦaaj to~u kapi tiriɬ~ɮ, ʦaajaj to~u ka tajaɾ, tajni sato~u ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj finawəran i pipaʦakajan to~u tamako~u ami iħan ato~u iro~umaʡ no~u ʦitapaŋaj a kakitaan a tamɬ~ɮaw amiɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u ɾaɾo~uŋo~uʦən, nikao~uɾiɾa ko~uwaŋən no~u so~ufitaj no~u ko~uapiŋ ko~u ko~uɾa tajɾaaj a finawo~uran, sanaw ʡaɾo~uman iraaj ko~u mapatajaj ato~u maɬ~ɮo~ukaʡaj o~uɾanan ko~u ɾaɾəŋatan no~u kaɾaɾiʡaŋ sato~u no~u finawo~uran, po~uɾo~uŋ sato~u tajra i ʦo~uwaʦo~uwa no~u tajwan, o~urasa jaʦito~uŋaj to~u finawo~uran ato~u tapaŋ kakitaan a tamɬ~ɮaw i, misaŋaʡ to~u ami pasao~uʡpo~u to~u ʦaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ami ɬ~ɮəmak to~u sapiħapiŋan to~uja kaɾaɾawɾaw no~u ɬ~ɮəmak a saʡo~upo~u, nanaj pakajni to~uja saʡo~upo~u ami ħapinaŋ to~uja ɬ~ɮəmak, ɾo~umasato~u, pakajni i sakapo~uɾo~uŋan a ʡiʦər no~u finawəran ami saŋaʡ to~usaka ʦiʡiʦər no~u so~ufitaj ami so~uɾiməɬ~ɮ to~ura sapiɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ a ko~uwan, tija ira to~u ko~uʔpo~uʦ no~u ɬ~ɮəmak to~usaka taɾaʡajaw. o~ujasa ʦi ʦən-i a tamɬ~ɮawan i, ħato~u miħaiaj ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ nira, ato~u mirajapaj to~u mikəto~una no~u sao~uʡpo~u a so~uwaɾ, nikao~uɾira, o~unian a ɬ~ɮəmakan i, paɾao~u mirawrawaj to~u ħəkaɾ ħananaj ko~u saʡo~usi, sanaw miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u ifafaɾəɬ~ɮaj ami o~uʦo~ur to~u so~ufitaj to~u sapaɬ~ɮaŋ, itira to~uja sakato~uɾo~u a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ to~u ɾima a ɾo~umiʡaɬ~ɮan i, mio~uʦo~ur to~u so~ufitaj a pajtajni i tajwan ko~ura ko~umiŋ-sajfo~u a tapaŋ ʦi ʦħaŋ-ʦħo~uŋ-ʦən , i saka to~uɾo~u fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ to~u ʔnəm a ɾo~umiʡaɬ~ɮan i, itini i takaw o~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj a tapaŋ ʦi po~uŋ-mo~uŋ-ʦi ħananaj a tamɬ~ɮaw misaɾiŋato~u to~u ami rəpər to~u finawəraŋ, itini i sakato~uɾo~u a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ to~u faro~u a ɾo~umiaʡɬ~ɮ o~u mao~uʦo~uraj a ħimpiŋ naitini i fo~uʦiŋ taŋasaaj to~u i kiɾo~uŋ ʦi ɾiw-i-siŋ ko~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj ami kəriɬ~ɮ to~uɾa so~ufitaj, saʡaɾo~umaŋ sato~u ko~u tajniaj a tajɾa i ʦo~uwaʦo~uwa ami ħaɬ~ɮəfək to~u nijaɾo~u, to~ujasato~u awaaj ko~u miɾitəmo~uħaj ami iħaŋ, taŋasa sato~u i saka to~uɾo~u fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ to~u mo~uʔtəp a ɾo~umiʡaɬ~ɮan, ʦi ʦħən-i ħananaj a tamɬ~ɮaw i, itija to~u ami kəto~un to~u sapi ɾikʡʦ to~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u tajwan, ʦaaj to~u kaŋaʡaj ama saʡpo~u to~u masamaamaanaj a saʡpo~u, sanaw tijato~u ami saɾiŋato~u aɬ~ɮiħaj to~u ko~u mapatajaj ato~u maɾasawaɬ~ɮaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, ŋaɾəfən itira i kiɾo~uŋ , kaki , takaw , maħaɬ~ɮəfəkaj ko~u saka nijanijaɾo~uʡ, paʦəf sato~u ami rəpər to~u kaɾo~u tamɬ~ɮaw, taŋasa to~uja ʦi wij-ɬ~ɮaw-miŋ ko~uʦi to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj a maɾa-tapaŋ no~u tajwan, tija maħəɾək ko~u paɾarəpər naŋra to~u tamaɬ~ɮaw. o~uɾanan a *** ħananaj a ɬ~ɮəmakan i, itijaaj a misaɾiŋato~u a saaɬ~ɮiħajaj ko~u marəpəraj ato~u miko~uwaŋ a mapataj ato~u o~u maɾasawaɬ~ɮaj a tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tajwan, ato~u ħaɾo~u ʦaaj ka pisaŋka to~u piiəħan a ʦi ʡataŋaɾaj a tamɬ~ɮaw i, itijaaj ama kaɾiŋaŋ, sanaw itija a misaɾiŋato~u mafaɾiʦ ko~u kaɾo~uɬ~ɮəmak no~u tajwanaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, maɾa sijiŋtər ko~u kasasiɾo~umaɾo~uma no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. riko~usato~u saħaɾafin sato~u ko~u piɾikəʦ no~ura sajfo~u to~u tajwanaj a tamɬ~ɮaw to~u pinapina a miħəʦaan, o~uɾanan ko~uja to~uməɾʡiaj a mikaɾiŋaŋaj ħananaj a ɬ~ɮəmakan, o~uɾanan a *** ħananaj a ɬ~ɮəmakan i, o~u pakajraaj to~u sapi ɾikəʦ to~u finawəran, sanaw mataɾa:waj ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw ama saso~uwaso~uwar, itijaaj ami saɾiŋato~u a ʦaajaj ka paʦəfa ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw ami saso~uwaso~uwaɾ, ato~u mi kiŋkiwaj sato~u ɾikisi a tamɬ~ɮaw i, ħatiraaj to~u ʦaaj ka o~uso~uʡəɾinaj ko~upi tiɾiɬ~ɮ, taŋasa saan i **** a miħəʦaan, o~uɾanan a *** ħananaj a ɬ~ɮəmakan tija iɾaaj to~u ko~upi so~uŋiɾaʡ to~u ɬ~ɮəmak, itija sato~u a aɾamipasaɬ~ɮak saan to~uno~u təkəɬ~ɮ a faɾo~uʦo~u ato~u ħaɾatəŋ, taŋasa i **** a miħəʦaan po~uɾo~uŋ sato~u ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ami kakiŋkiw to~ura *** ħananaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, ɾo~umasato~u iraħaʦa ko~upi ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮimaw to~uja nano~u makaɾiʡaŋaj a paro~uɬ~ɮ to~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan, ato~u mipatiɾəŋ to~u sapikiniŋ a ʡapo~uno~uŋ, mipaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u paɾo~u no~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan. aninisato~u itini i tajwanan mapatiɾəŋ to~u ko~u pikiniŋan to~u *** ħananaj a ʦiʦiŋħo~uj o~upiso~upəɬ~ɮan to~u piɬ~ɮa, ato~u paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u *** ħananaj a pikiniŋan a ʡaɬ~ɮawaŋ , itini i ʦo~uaʦo~ua a kasanijaɾo~u i, iraaj to~u ko~uja patiɾəŋan a siɾo~usi no~u *** ħananaj tamo~uħo~uŋ.(so~u~uman siwko~uɾan ʡamis/panʦaħ **/**ʡ**) taħapinanaŋ****:
S.FORM: == 228 a demakan i Taywan.二二八事件 == Olanan a 228 hananay a demak i Taywan i, o naitilaay tora piihan no finawelan to demak no Sayfo ama lawlaw itini i cowacowa a niyaroan itini i 1947 a mihcaan to saka tosa a folad to 27 a lomi'adan tangasa i saka lima a folad to 16 a lomi'adan, likorsato iraay to ko pihadefek no Congwhamingko hananay ami ocol to sofitay ami hadefek tofinaweran, nawhani nano 'ayaw naitila toya 1945 a mihecaan to saka mo^tep a foladan, yamahelek ko fodfod tora saka tosa a sakalafodfod no polong no hekalan, maocor nola citodongay to Taywan ami 'ekan to Taywan ci Cen-i hananay a tamdaw apatay i Taywan. oyasa a demak i, masapipakakinih ko faloco' no demak nira ami demak to dademaken, caay ko fangcalay ko pidemak nira to dademaken, sanaw o 'alomanay to cifalocoay o mafana'ay ci halateng a tamdaw no Taywan i, ano haenen ko pidemak o saan, yasahaw i, iraayho ko kara lood no Komintang ato Kiosanto hananay itiya, itini ikalafodfod nara i, o 'orip sa no finaoran, caay ka ^edeng ko saka 'orip to kakaenen ato saka 'orip to kalomaamaan, adihayay ko mapadesay, caay pakakilim to katayalen, lalawlaw sanayho ko 'orip no finaworan ato itini i kasaniyalo', lomasato itini i pakaylaay i kacakat no fana' to tilid i, i'ayaw no fodfod i,onian a Taywan haw i o nano o Dipon komikowanay, sanaw tayni sato koya Holam caay kalalen ko fana', masalomaay ko fana' ato faloco', sanaw iraay ko longoc nora Holam to Taywanay a tamdaw, olanan ko saka lalawlaw nara, sanaw onian ko saka fafodfod no niyalo, ato sakalalowod no finawolan. olarengadan nila : Itini i 1947 no mihecaan to saka tosa a folad 27 a lomi'ad i, ola a simmong ami pacakayay to tamako itini i Tayhok Taypi tin Tinma hananay loma' i, maleped nangra ato kal'ingangen nangra koya ci Lin-cang-may ato mapatay nangra koya Chen-wen-si hananay a tamdaw, orasato oya finawelan, onian sato koya saka keter nangra, sanaw mikihatiya sato ko 'alomanay ami ihang, itini i saka tosa a folad no 28 a lomi'adan, caay to pikihatiya ami pacakay to kalomaamaan, ato caay to kapi tirid, caayay to ka tayal, tayni sato ko 'alomanay finaweran i pipacakayan to tamako ami ihan ato iroma' no citapangay a kakitaan a tamdaw amilongoc to lalongocen, nikaolila kowangen no sofitay no Koaping ko kola taylaay a finaworan, sanaw 'aloman iraay ko mapatayay ato madoka'ay olanan ko lalengatan no kalali'ang sato no finaworan, polong sato tayra i cowacowa no Taywan, orasa yacitongay to finaworan ato tapang kakitaan a tamdaw i, misanga' to ami pasao'po to cacitodong ami demak to sapihapingan toya kalalawlaw no demak a sa'opo, nanay pakayni toya sa'opo ami hapinang toya demak, lomasato, pakayni i sakapolongan a 'icer no finaweran ami sanga' tosaka ci'icer no sofitay ami solimed tora sapilood a kowan, tiya ira to ko^poc no demak tosaka tala'ayaw. Oyasa ci Cen-i a tamdawan i, hato mihaiay ko faloco' nira, ato mirayapay to miketona no sao'po a sowal, nikaolira, onian a demakan i, palao mirawraway to hekal hananay ko sa'osi, sanaw milongoc to ifafaleday ami ocor to sofitay to sapadang, itira toya sakatolo a folad to lima a lomi'adan i, miocor to sofitay a paytayni i Taywan kora Koming-sayfo a tapang ci Chang-chong-cen , i saka tolo folad to ^nem a lomi'adan i, itini i Takaw o citodongay a tapang ci Pong-mong-ci hananay a tamdaw misalingato to ami reper to finawerang, itini i sakatolo a folad to faro a lomia'd o maocoray a himping naitini i Focing tangasaay to i Kilong ci Liw-i-sing ko citodongay ami kerid tola sofitay, sa'alomang sato ko tayniay a tayla i cowacowa ami hadefek to niyalo, toyasato awaay ko militemohay ami ihang, tangasa sato i saka tolo folad to mo^tep a lomi'adan, ci Chen-i hananay a tamdaw i, itiya to ami keton to sapi lik'c to polong no Taywan, caay to kanga'ay ama sa'po to masamaamaanay a sa'po, sanaw tiyato ami salingato adihay to ko mapatayay ato malasawaday a tamdaw, ngalefen itira i Kilong , Kaki , Takaw , mahadefekay ko saka niyaniyalo', pacef sato ami reper to kalo tamdaw, tangasa toya ci Wiy-daw-ming koci todongay a mala-tapang no Taywan, tiya mahelek ko palareper nangra to tamadaw. Olanan a 228 hananay a demakan i, itiyaay a misalingato a saadihayay ko mareperay ato mikowang a mapatay ato o malasawaday a tamdaw no Taywan, ato halo caay ka pisangka to piiehan a ci 'atangalay a tamdaw i, itiyaay ama kalingang, sanaw itiya a misalingato mafalic ko kalodemak no Taywanay a tamdaw, mala siyingter ko kasasilomaloma no tamdaw. Rikosato sahalafin sato ko pilikec nora sayfo to Taywanay a tamdaw to pinapina a mihecaan, olanan koya tomel'iay a mikalingangay hananay a demakan, olanan a 228 hananay a demakan i, o pakayraay to sapi likec to finaweran, sanaw matala:way ko tamdaw ama sasowasowar, itiyaay ami salingato a caayay ka pacefa ko tamdaw ami sasowasowal, ato mi kingkiway sato likisi a tamdaw i, hatiraay to caay ka oso'elinay kopi tilid, tangasa saan i 1980 a mihecaan, olanan a 228 hananay a demakan tiya ilaay to kopi songila' to demak, itiya sato a alamipasadak saan tono teked a faloco ato halateng, tangasa i 1990 a mihecaan polong sato ko 'alomanay a tamdaw ami kakingkiw tora 228 hananay a demak, lomasato irahaca kopi dadimaw toya nano makali'angay a parod to laloma'an, ato mipatileng to sapikining a 'aponong, mipalowad to palo no laloma'an. Aninisato itini i Taywanan mapatileng to ko pikiningan to 228 hananay a Cicinghoy opisopedan to pida, ato palowad to 228 hananay a pikiningan a 'adawang , itini i coacoa a kasaniyalo i, iraay to koya patilengan a silosi no 228 hananay tamohong.(Suman siwkolan 'Amis/Pancah 02/26'25) Tahapinanang參考文獻:
S.PHON: == *** a ɬ~ɮəmakan i tajwan.***** == o~uɾanan a *** ħananaj a ɬ~ɮəmak i tajwan i, o~u naitiɾaaj to~ura piiħan no~u finawəɾan to~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u sajfo~u ama ɾawɾaw itini i ʦo~uwaʦo~uwa a nijaro~uan itini i **** a miħʦaan to~u saka to~usa a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ to~u ** a ɾo~umiʡaɬ~ɮan taŋasa i saka ɾima a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ to~u ** a ɾo~umiʡaɬ~ɮan, ɾiko~ursato~u iraaj to~u ko~u piħaɬ~ɮəfək no~u ʦo~uŋwħamiŋko~u ħananaj ami o~uʦo~uɾ to~u so~ufitaj ami ħaɬ~ɮəfək to~ufinawəran, nawħani nano~u ʡajaw naitiɾa to~uja **** a miħəʦaan to~u saka mo~uʔtəp a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮan, jamaħəɾək ko~u fo~uɬ~ɮfo~uɬ~ɮ to~ura saka to~usa a sakaɾafo~uɬ~ɮfo~uɬ~ɮ no~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ħəkaɾan, mao~uʦo~ur no~uɾa ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u tajwan ami ʡəkan to~u tajwan ʦi ʦən-i ħananaj a tamɬ~ɮaw apataj i tajwan. o~ujasa a ɬ~ɮəmak i, masapipakakiniħ ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u ɬ~ɮəmak nira ami ɬ~ɮəmak to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakən, ʦaaj ko~u faŋʦaɾaj ko~u piɬ~ɮəmak nira to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakən, sanaw o~u ʡaɾo~umanaj to~u ʦifaɾo~uʦo~uaj o~u mafanaʡaj ʦi ħaɾatəŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tajwan i, ano~u ħaənən ko~u piɬ~ɮəmak o~u saan, jasaħaw i, iraajħo~u ko~u kara ɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u ko~umintaŋ ato~u kio~usanto~u ħananaj itija, itini ikaɾafo~uɬ~ɮfo~uɬ~ɮ nara i, o~u ʡo~urip sa no~u finao~uran, ʦaaj ka ʔəɬ~ɮəŋ ko~u saka ʡo~urip to~u kakaənən ato~u saka ʡo~urip to~u kaɾo~umaamaan, aɬ~ɮiħajaj ko~u mapaɬ~ɮəsaj, ʦaaj pakakiɾim to~u katajaɾən, ɾaɾawɾaw sanajħo~u ko~u ʡo~urip no~u finawo~uran ato~u itini i kasanijaɾo~uʡ, ɾo~umasato~u itini i pakajɾaaj i kaʦakat no~u fanaʡ to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ i, iʡajaw no~u fo~uɬ~ɮfo~uɬ~ɮ i,o~unian a tajwan ħaw i o~u nano~u o~u ɬ~ɮipo~un ko~umiko~uwanaj, sanaw tajni sato~u ko~uja ħo~uɾam ʦaaj kaɾaɾən ko~u fanaʡ, masaɾo~umaaj ko~u fanaʡ ato~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ, sanaw iraaj ko~u ɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~ura ħo~uɾam to~u tajwanaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, o~uɾanan ko~u saka ɾaɾawɾaw nara, sanaw o~unian ko~u saka fafo~uɬ~ɮfo~uɬ~ɮ no~u nijaɾo~u, ato~u sakaɾaɾo~uwo~uɬ~ɮ no~u finawo~uɾan. o~uɾarəŋaɬ~ɮan niɾa : itini i **** no~u miħəʦaan to~u saka to~usa a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** a ɾo~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i, o~uɾa a simmo~uŋ ami paʦakajaj to~u tamako~u itini i tajħo~uk tajpi tin tinma ħananaj ɾo~umaʡ i, maɾəpəɬ~ɮ naŋra ato~u kaɾʡiŋaŋən naŋra ko~uja ʦi ɾin-ʦaŋ-maj ato~u mapataj naŋra ko~uja ʦħən-wən-si ħananaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, o~urasato~u o~uja finawəɾan, o~unian sato~u ko~uja saka kətər naŋra, sanaw mikiħatija sato~u ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj ami iħaŋ, itini i saka to~usa a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ no~u ** a ɾo~umiʡaɬ~ɮan, ʦaaj to~u pikiħatija ami paʦakaj to~u kaɾo~umaamaan, ato~u ʦaaj to~u kapi tiriɬ~ɮ, ʦaajaj to~u ka tajaɾ, tajni sato~u ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj finawəran i pipaʦakajan to~u tamako~u ami iħan ato~u iro~umaʡ no~u ʦitapaŋaj a kakitaan a tamɬ~ɮaw amiɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u ɾaɾo~uŋo~uʦən, nikao~uɾiɾa ko~uwaŋən no~u so~ufitaj no~u ko~uapiŋ ko~u ko~uɾa tajɾaaj a finawo~uran, sanaw ʡaɾo~uman iraaj ko~u mapatajaj ato~u maɬ~ɮo~ukaʡaj o~uɾanan ko~u ɾaɾəŋatan no~u kaɾaɾiʡaŋ sato~u no~u finawo~uran, po~uɾo~uŋ sato~u tajra i ʦo~uwaʦo~uwa no~u tajwan, o~urasa jaʦito~uŋaj to~u finawo~uran ato~u tapaŋ kakitaan a tamɬ~ɮaw i, misaŋaʡ to~u ami pasao~uʡpo~u to~u ʦaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ami ɬ~ɮəmak to~u sapiħapiŋan to~uja kaɾaɾawɾaw no~u ɬ~ɮəmak a saʡo~upo~u, nanaj pakajni to~uja saʡo~upo~u ami ħapinaŋ to~uja ɬ~ɮəmak, ɾo~umasato~u, pakajni i sakapo~uɾo~uŋan a ʡiʦər no~u finawəran ami saŋaʡ to~usaka ʦiʡiʦər no~u so~ufitaj ami so~uɾiməɬ~ɮ to~ura sapiɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ a ko~uwan, tija ira to~u ko~uʔpo~uʦ no~u ɬ~ɮəmak to~usaka taɾaʡajaw. o~ujasa ʦi ʦən-i a tamɬ~ɮawan i, ħato~u miħaiaj ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ nira, ato~u mirajapaj to~u mikəto~una no~u sao~uʡpo~u a so~uwaɾ, nikao~uɾira, o~unian a ɬ~ɮəmakan i, paɾao~u mirawrawaj to~u ħəkaɾ ħananaj ko~u saʡo~usi, sanaw miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u ifafaɾəɬ~ɮaj ami o~uʦo~ur to~u so~ufitaj to~u sapaɬ~ɮaŋ, itira to~uja sakato~uɾo~u a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ to~u ɾima a ɾo~umiʡaɬ~ɮan i, mio~uʦo~ur to~u so~ufitaj a pajtajni i tajwan ko~ura ko~umiŋ-sajfo~u a tapaŋ ʦi ʦħaŋ-ʦħo~uŋ-ʦən , i saka to~uɾo~u fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ to~u ʔnəm a ɾo~umiʡaɬ~ɮan i, itini i takaw o~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj a tapaŋ ʦi po~uŋ-mo~uŋ-ʦi ħananaj a tamɬ~ɮaw misaɾiŋato~u to~u ami rəpər to~u finawəraŋ, itini i sakato~uɾo~u a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ to~u faro~u a ɾo~umiaʡɬ~ɮ o~u mao~uʦo~uraj a ħimpiŋ naitini i fo~uʦiŋ taŋasaaj to~u i kiɾo~uŋ ʦi ɾiw-i-siŋ ko~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj ami kəriɬ~ɮ to~uɾa so~ufitaj, saʡaɾo~umaŋ sato~u ko~u tajniaj a tajɾa i ʦo~uwaʦo~uwa ami ħaɬ~ɮəfək to~u nijaɾo~u, to~ujasato~u awaaj ko~u miɾitəmo~uħaj ami iħaŋ, taŋasa sato~u i saka to~uɾo~u fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ to~u mo~uʔtəp a ɾo~umiʡaɬ~ɮan, ʦi ʦħən-i ħananaj a tamɬ~ɮaw i, itija to~u ami kəto~un to~u sapi ɾikʡʦ to~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u tajwan, ʦaaj to~u kaŋaʡaj ama saʡpo~u to~u masamaamaanaj a saʡpo~u, sanaw tijato~u ami saɾiŋato~u aɬ~ɮiħaj to~u ko~u mapatajaj ato~u maɾasawaɬ~ɮaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, ŋaɾəfən itira i kiɾo~uŋ , kaki , takaw , maħaɬ~ɮəfəkaj ko~u saka nijanijaɾo~uʡ, paʦəf sato~u ami rəpər to~u kaɾo~u tamɬ~ɮaw, taŋasa to~uja ʦi wij-ɬ~ɮaw-miŋ ko~uʦi to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj a maɾa-tapaŋ no~u tajwan, tija maħəɾək ko~u paɾarəpər naŋra to~u tamaɬ~ɮaw. o~uɾanan a *** ħananaj a ɬ~ɮəmakan i, itijaaj a misaɾiŋato~u a saaɬ~ɮiħajaj ko~u marəpəraj ato~u miko~uwaŋ a mapataj ato~u o~u maɾasawaɬ~ɮaj a tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tajwan, ato~u ħaɾo~u ʦaaj ka pisaŋka to~u piiəħan a ʦi ʡataŋaɾaj a tamɬ~ɮaw i, itijaaj ama kaɾiŋaŋ, sanaw itija a misaɾiŋato~u mafaɾiʦ ko~u kaɾo~uɬ~ɮəmak no~u tajwanaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, maɾa sijiŋtər ko~u kasasiɾo~umaɾo~uma no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. riko~usato~u saħaɾafin sato~u ko~u piɾikəʦ no~ura sajfo~u to~u tajwanaj a tamɬ~ɮaw to~u pinapina a miħəʦaan, o~uɾanan ko~uja to~uməɾʡiaj a mikaɾiŋaŋaj ħananaj a ɬ~ɮəmakan, o~uɾanan a *** ħananaj a ɬ~ɮəmakan i, o~u pakajraaj to~u sapi ɾikəʦ to~u finawəran, sanaw mataɾa:waj ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw ama saso~uwaso~uwar, itijaaj ami saɾiŋato~u a ʦaajaj ka paʦəfa ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw ami saso~uwaso~uwaɾ, ato~u mi kiŋkiwaj sato~u ɾikisi a tamɬ~ɮaw i, ħatiraaj to~u ʦaaj ka o~uso~uʡəɾinaj ko~upi tiɾiɬ~ɮ, taŋasa saan i **** a miħəʦaan, o~uɾanan a *** ħananaj a ɬ~ɮəmakan tija iɾaaj to~u ko~upi so~uŋiɾaʡ to~u ɬ~ɮəmak, itija sato~u a aɾamipasaɬ~ɮak saan to~uno~u təkəɬ~ɮ a faɾo~uʦo~u ato~u ħaɾatəŋ, taŋasa i **** a miħəʦaan po~uɾo~uŋ sato~u ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ami kakiŋkiw to~ura *** ħananaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, ɾo~umasato~u iraħaʦa ko~upi ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮimaw to~uja nano~u makaɾiʡaŋaj a paro~uɬ~ɮ to~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan, ato~u mipatiɾəŋ to~u sapikiniŋ a ʡapo~uno~uŋ, mipaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u paɾo~u no~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan. aninisato~u itini i tajwanan mapatiɾəŋ to~u ko~u pikiniŋan to~u *** ħananaj a ʦiʦiŋħo~uj o~upiso~upəɬ~ɮan to~u piɬ~ɮa, ato~u paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u *** ħananaj a pikiniŋan a ʡaɬ~ɮawaŋ , itini i ʦo~uaʦo~ua a kasanijaɾo~u i, iraaj to~u ko~uja patiɾəŋan a siɾo~usi no~u *** ħananaj tamo~uħo~uŋ.(so~u~uman siwko~uɾan ʡamis/panʦaħ **/**ʡ**) taħapinanaŋ****:
